sqlMap.select: select prod_name, prod_stock from PROD where prod_id=#prod_id#
select prod_id, prod_name, prod_stock from PROD
sqlMap.update: update PROD set prod_stock = #prod_stock# where prod_id = #prod_id#
sqlMap.select: select * from PROD order by prod_id
sqlMap.update: update PROD set prod_name = #prod_name#, prod_price = #prod_price#, prod_stock = #prod_stock# where prod_id = #prod_id#
sqlMap.select: select b.lprod_id, a.lprod_type from lprod a, prod b where a.lprod_id = b.lprod_id order by b.prod_id
select order_id from mem_order where mem_id = #mem_id# and order_status is null
select count(*) from interested_items where prod_id = #prod_id# and mem_id = #mem_id#
